steps.title: Apply the density formula
steps.content: Density is mass divided by volume. With mass = 168 grams and volume = 24 cubic centimeters: $$\text{density} = \frac{168}{24}$$

steps.title: Simplify to find density
steps.content: Divide 168 by 24. Since $24 \times 7 = 168$, we have $$\frac{168}{24} = 7$$. The density is 7 grams per cubic centimeter. That matches choice A — A is correct.
